message:
feat(tests): add 35 property tests for extension_license and extension_popularity

16 proptests for extension_license (license detection, SPDX roundtrips, case
insensitivity, redistributability invariants, security scanning, screening
report count/sort invariants, serde roundtrips)

19 proptests for extension_popularity (GitHub URL parsing, .git suffix
stripping, whitespace tolerance, slug guessing, JSON response parsing,
npm downloads/registry, PopularityEvidence serde roundtrip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
